channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Leader halts water intake from South Saskatchewan River after fuel spill
item.description: The Town of Leader in Saskatchewan has announced a temporary suspension of drawing water from the South Saskatchewan River following a recent fuel spill. Authorities are taking precautionary measures ...

item.title: Three fatalities reported following hantavirus outbreak on African cruise ship
item.description: A deadly outbreak of hantavirus on a cruise ship off the coast of Africa has left three people dead and hundreds of passengers stranded. The cruise, which had been traveling through international wate...

item.title: Live Updates on Election 2026 Vote Counting Across Key States in India
item.description: The 2026 state assembly elections in India have entered the critical stage of vote counting in several states including West Bengal, Tamil Nadu, Kerala, Assam, and the Union Territory of Puducherry. M...

item.title: Hantavirus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship results in three deaths and multiple illnesses
item.description: Health authorities are investigating a serious outbreak aboard an Atlantic cruise ship where three people have died and several others have fallen ill, according to the World Health Organization (WHO)...

item.title: Kagame and Suluhu Agree to Strengthen Rwanda–Tanzania Cooperation in Trade and Infrastructure
item.description: Rwanda President Paul Kagame has reaffirmed strong and close relations between Rwanda and Tanzania, describing the two countries as “brotherly nations” with shared history and common development goals...

item.title: Assam Assembly Election 2026: Vote Counting Begins with BJP Leading Early Trends
item.description: The counting of votes for Assam’s 126 Assembly constituencies commenced on Monday, May 4, 2026, to determine whether the incumbent Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP)-led NDA will secure a third consecutive ...

item.title: Parliament committee questions universities on hiring of foreign academics amid national concerns
item.description: The Portfolio Committee on Higher Education, chaired by Tebogo Letsie, has publicly criticised statements made by Universities South Africa (USAf) Executive Officer Dr Phethiwe Matutu regarding foreig...

item.title: Trump responds optimistically despite record high disapproval ratings
item.description: Donald Trump is facing record high disapproval ratings among the American public, reflecting growing dissatisfaction with his policies and leadership style. Despite the figures, Trump maintains a posi...

item.title: PSX Sees Significant Intraday Gain Amid Global Oil and Geopolitical Developments
item.description: On Monday, the Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) experienced a notable intraday rally, with the KSE-100 index climbing 4,170 points to reach 167,164.26 from the previous close of 162,994.17. Analysts attr...

item.title: Harvard study finds AI models can match or exceed internal medicine doctors in ER diagnosis accuracy
item.description: A recent Harvard Medical School study evaluated how OpenAI's large language models perform in medical diagnostics, specifically in emergency room settings. The study compared the performance of two in...

item.title: Montreal Canadiens advance to second round after Game 7 victory over Tampa Bay
item.description: The Montreal Canadiens have advanced to the second round of the NHL playoffs following a hard-fought 2-1 victory over the Tampa Bay Lightning in Game 7. Alex Newhook scored the decisive goal midway th...

item.title: Key Events Across Africa on May 4, 2026: Nigeria-South Africa Tensions, Kenya Floods, and Piracy Threats
item.description: On 4th May 2026, several major incidents across Africa were reported. Nigeria summoned South Africa's acting High Commissioner to express deep concern over recent anti-immigrant attacks that have kill...

item.title: United Airlines jet clips light pole on approach to Newark, triggering federal investigation
item.description: A United Airlines Boeing 767 arriving from Venice, Italy, made contact with a light pole while landing at Newark Liberty International Airport on Sunday afternoon, prompting investigations by U.S. avi...

item.title: Aniebonam Accuses Kwankwaso of Trying to Take Over NNPP
item.description: The founder of the New Nigeria Peoples Party (NNPP), Boniface Aniebonam, don clear say Senator Rabiu Kwankwaso, wey be the party’s 2023 presidential candidate, no leave the party because of external l...

item.title: Rwanda President Kagame Visits Tanzania to Strengthen Bilateral Trade and Cooperation
item.description: The President of Rwanda, Paul Kagame, has arrived in Dar es Salaam for a one-day working visit aimed at deepening cooperation between Rwanda and Tanzania. During the visit, he is expected to hold offi...

item.title: Armed Suspect Holds Hostage Following Beverly Hills Police Chase
item.description: On Sunday evening, a police pursuit in Beverly Hills escalated into a prolonged standoff after a suspect, wanted for allegedly attempting to murder a Los Angeles County sheriff’s deputy, fled in a pic...

item.title: Domestic abuser jailed for 23 years after sustained violence against partner Lucy Godley
item.description: Lucy Godley, a 29-year-old mother of two from Portsmouth, has spoken about enduring years of severe domestic abuse at the hands of her former partner, Ben Siddle, who has now been sentenced to 23 year...

item.title: Flu and RSV Circulating Early: Vaccination Urged for High-Risk Groups
item.description: South Africa’s flu season has arrived earlier than usual, with cases of influenza and respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) already being reported. The National Institute for Communicable Diseases (NICD) ...

item.title: Toronto Jewish community targeted in hate-motivated gel-blaster attack
item.description: Toronto police are investigating a hate-motivated assault in North York in which visibly Jewish individuals were shot with a gel-blaster, a non-lethal firearm that fires water-absorbent beads. The inc...

item.title: Preparations and issues reported before West Bengal vote counting
item.description: The news article reportedly discusses the events in West Bengal just before the counting of votes during the recent elections. Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee made a significant move or statement prior...
